codeReview.summary: The implementation is clean, well-structured, and fully covers the feature requirements. Mark state management is cleanly separated into pure functions in marks.ts with dependency injection for sessionStorage, making it highly testable. The UI components properly use aria-pressed for accessibility and provide both color and icon-based visual feedback for marked state. All 37 unit tests thoroughly cover parsing, serialization, toggling, storage I/O, edge cases, and rapid interaction scenarios.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md lists key file paths using mixed conventions: some use `app/routes/` prefix (e.g., `app/routes/__root.tsx`) while the actual codebase uses `src/routes/`. The `Key Files` section has an inconsistency — `app/routes/__root.tsx` vs `src/routes/index.tsx`. This could confuse future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md 'Key Files' section lists 'app/routes/__root.tsx — Root layout' alongside 'src/routes/index.tsx — Landing page'. The actual repo uses src/routes/ consistently.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker used Tailwind's `bg-[var(--lagoon)]/20` opacity modifier syntax with CSS custom properties. This is a Tailwind v4+ pattern that works but may not be obvious to all workers. No documentation exists in the library about project-specific Tailwind patterns or custom CSS variable usage.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Square.tsx uses 'bg-[var(--lagoon)]/20', 'hover:bg-[var(--lagoon)]/30', 'border-[var(--lagoon-deep)]' etc. No architecture.md or library doc explains the custom CSS variable system (--lagoon, --sea-ink, --surface, etc.)

sharedStateObservations.observation: The project uses CSS custom properties (--lagoon, --lagoon-deep, --sea-ink, --sea-ink-soft, --surface) for theming but there's no documentation in .factory/library/ about this design system. The library directory is empty. Future workers would benefit from knowing the available CSS variables and their semantic meaning.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Square.tsx and game.tsx use multiple CSS variables: --lagoon, --lagoon-deep, --sea-ink, --sea-ink-soft, --surface. The .factory/library/ directory contains no files at all.

summary: The square-marking feature is well-implemented and passes review. The mark state logic is cleanly separated into pure, testable functions in marks.ts with dependency injection for sessionStorage access. The Square component provides proper accessibility (aria-pressed, non-color indicator via checkmark icon) and visual feedback (background color change, strikethrough text, checkmark stamp). The Board component correctly threads marks and onToggle props. The game route properly initializes from sessionStorage, reloads on seed change, and persists on every state change. 37 unit tests comprehensively cover all public functions. No blocking or non-blocking issues found. Minor shared state gaps noted: AGENTS.md has inconsistent file path prefixes (app/ vs src/), and the project's CSS custom property design system is undocumented in .factory/library/.
